page: OVHcloud r3-256 is a memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC processor running at 2.3 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, with a cache configuration of 32 KB L1d, 0.5 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

In benchmark evaluations, the r3-256 demonstrates strong performance across multiple categories. It ranks in the top 25% for both single-core and multi-core CPU performance via stress-ng, as well as in Geekbench and Passmark CPU tests. Memory performance is highly efficient, with read-only and write bandwidth tests for large blocks placing in the top 25%. Database operations and Redis SET operations also achieve strong results, with Redis reaching 75.95 million operations per second. However, single-threaded gzip compression and static web serving throughput perform at average levels.

The instance offers high resource density for memory-intensive workloads, delivering strong memory bandwidth and database processing capabilities relative to its hardware profile. While it lacks GPU acceleration and has no data for large-scale LLM inference, it performs well in small-model LLM inference and software compilation. The r3-256 is suited for memory-optimized databases, caching layers, data processing, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated CPU resources and large memory capacities.
description: OVHcloud r3-256 is a memory-optimized server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and powered by an AMD EPYC x86_64 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs operating at 2.3 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM, which yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The server includes a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD and an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. In benchmark testing, the r3-256 delivers strong performance in multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations, with Redis SET operations reaching 75.95 million operations per second. While single-threaded compression and static web serving throughput remain average, the instance provides high resource density for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suited for memory-optimized databases, caching layers, software compilation, and data processing tasks.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-256 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 256 GB of RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering strong database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud r3-256 is a memory-optimized KVM server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 256 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for database and data processing workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores, high-bandwidth RAM, and NVMe storage for demanding database and data processing workloads.

256 GB RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory ratio
Bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD local storage and 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth
Strong memory bandwidth and database performance in benchmark testing
Suited for memory-optimized databases, caching, and data processing
